title: CSIR NEERI Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Associate I Posts
description: CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Project Associate I Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech in Chemical Engineering, M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the CSIR NEERI Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can att...
